2606.27119.title: Efficient foundation decoders for fault-tolerant quantum computing
2606.27119.paper_summary: Foundation decoders, a class of high-capacity neural decoders, are leading candidates for fault-tolerant quantum computing, with accurate and efficient decoding at large code distances. However, their construction often faces a steep scaling barrier, as larger code distances rapidly amplify the cost of syndrome generation and neural optimization. To address this bottleneck, here we devise neural transfer unification (NTU), a unified framework for efficient foundation decoders. A central feature of NTU is its ability to align decoding tasks across code distances via algebraic structures shared by scalable code families, which enables knowledge learned on smaller codes to accelerate large-scale decoder training. We instantiate NTU as NTU-Transformer, a transformer-based neural decoder tailored for planar surface codes and bivariate bicycle codes. For planar surface codes under circuit-level noise, NTU-Transformer outperforms correlation-aware matching on the $[\![361,1,19]\!]$ code and further scales to the $[\![625,1,25]\!]$ code, where it exceeds standard matching through transfer adaptation. For the bivariate bicycle code with $[\![72,12,6]\!]$, it surpasses Relay-BP in the low-physical-error regime. These results establish our proposal as a scalable route to amortized cross-distance training of foundation decoders for fault-tolerant quantum processors.
2606.27119.paper_summary_zh: 基礎解碼器，一類高容量神經解碼器，是容錯量子計算的主要候選者，能在大碼距下進行準確且高效的解碼。然而，它們的構建往往面臨嚴峻的擴展障礙，因為更大的碼距迅速增加了綜合生成和神經優化的成本。為了解決這一瓶頸，我們在此設計了神經轉移統一（NTU），這是一個高效基礎解碼器的統一框架。NTU的一個核心特徵是其能夠通過可擴展碼族共享的代數結構來對齊不同碼距的解碼任務，這使得在較小碼上學到的知識能加速大規模解碼器的訓練。我們將NTU具體化為NTU-Transformer，一種基於Transformer的神經解碼器，專為平面表面碼和雙變量自行車碼量身定制。在電路級噪聲下的平面表面碼中，NTU-Transformer在$[\![361,1,19]\!]$碼上超越了考慮相關性的匹配，並進一步擴展到$[\![625,1,25]\!]$碼，在那裡它通過轉移適應超越了標準匹配。對於$[\![72,12,6]\!]$的雙變量自行車碼，它在低物理錯誤範疇中超越了Relay-BP。這些結果確立了我們的提議作為一條可擴展的路徑，實現基礎解碼器在容錯量子處理器上的跨距訓練。
2606.27119.author: Ge Yan et.al.
2606.27119.authors: Ge Yan, Shanchuan Li, Shiyi Xiao, Pengyue Ma, Hanyan Cao, Feng Pan, Yuxuan Du
